--- 

image: Ada.png 
description: Adjunct Lecturer 
about: 
  template: trestles 
  image-width: 10em 
  image-shape: round 

  links: 
    - icon: github 
      text: GitHub 
      href: https://github.com/adasanchez 
    - icon: orcid 
      text: ORCID 
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-5030-2128 
    - icon: person-vcard 
      text: Staff page 
      href: https://www.unsw.edu.au/staff/ada-sanchez-mercado 

title: Dr. Ada Sanchez-Mercado 

--- 

Dr. Ada Sanchez-Mercado completed a PhD in Ecology at the Venezuelan Institute of Scientific Research. She has ten years of research experience in conservation biology of vertebrate and invertebrate species, with emphasis in modelling and quantitative ecology. Ada has experience leading and conducting research focused on animal species distribution patterns, species threats monitoring, and human dimension of wildlife conservation, and helping NGOs and research teams design evidence-based, efficient conservation actions through innovative analytical approaches to make the most out of the available data. She studied and worked in Venezuela, South Africa, and the USA.
